title: Vanilla Supreme
description: An modpack like Simply Optimized with Create, Abnormals mods, Farmer's Delight and many other mods. For Forge. Just, any vanilla+ modpack doesn't suit me.
body:
# An vanilla+ modpack like Simply Optimized with Create and many other mods. For Forge.

Featuring: **Create**, **Abnormals mods**, **Farmer's Delight**, **Supplementaries**, ~~JEI~~ EMI, Embeddium, and more.

**Complementary Shaders** compatible.

Best for players that want both performance and some vanilla-friendly mods.
Based on Wing Embeddium.
[My GitHub](https://github.com/Eggmanplant).
Notes:
**The release date is false, the project has been 2 months unshared.**

Can you redistribute?
- Yes, but please don't

Logo created using a Blockbench plugin created by Ewan Howell.
